title: Calacatta Gold Marble
creator: Artisan Stone Co.
style: A luxurious Italian marble tile featuring dramatic gold veining on a pristine white background. Perfect for statement floors and feature walls.

title: Midnight Slate Mosaic
creator: Urban Stone Works
style: Deep charcoal slate mosaic tiles with a textured surface. Ideal for bathroom floors and outdoor spaces with a raw, industrial character.

title: Azure Moroccan Pattern
creator: Marrakech Designs
style: Vibrant blue ceramic tiles featuring traditional Moroccan geometric patterns. Adds a bold cultural statement to kitchens and bathrooms.

title: Terracotta Rustic Floor
creator: Mediterranean Tile House
style: Warm earthy terracotta tiles with a handcrafted rustic finish. Brings the warmth of Mediterranean sun to any living space.

title: Emerald Subway Tile
creator: Metro Tile Studio
style: Classic subway tile in deep emerald green with a high-gloss finish. Perfect for kitchen backsplashes and bathroom walls with a vintage touch.

title: Nordic Linen Porcelain
creator: Scandinavian Tile Co.
style: Minimalist light grey porcelain tiles with a subtle linen texture. Designed for Scandinavian-inspired interiors with clean lines and calm aesthetics.

title: Obsidian Hexagon
creator: Geo Tile Collective
style: Striking matte black hexagonal porcelain tiles. Creates a bold geometric statement in bathrooms, wet rooms and feature walls.

title: Rose Quartz Limestone
creator: Luxe Stone Gallery
style: Delicate pink-hued limestone tiles with natural fossil inclusions. A unique luxury choice for spa bathrooms and high-end residential spaces.

title: Saharan Sand Travertine
creator: Desert Stone Imports
style: Warm sandy travertine with natural pitting and linear patterns. Evokes the beauty of ancient Roman architecture in modern interiors.

title: Cobalt Zellige
creator: Fez Artisan Collective
style: Hand-cut cobalt blue zellige tiles from Morocco. Each tile is unique with slight variations adding depth and character to walls and pools.

title: Forest Fern Encaustic
creator: Botanical Tile Studio
style: Hand-pressed cement encaustic tiles featuring a botanical fern motif in sage green. Perfect for creating an organic, nature-inspired space.

title: Champagne Micro Mosaic
creator: Venetian Glass Works
style: Iridescent champagne glass micro-mosaic tiles that shimmer with light. Designed for luxury pool linings, feature walls and spa environments.
